moments.title: The Open Championship Live
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship continues live from Royal Portrush, Northern Ireland, running until Sunday.

angles.name: Golf Action
angles.copy: Who's making birdies and who's finding the bunkers? The Open Championship is live from Royal Portrush all weekend!

angles.name: Weekend Sport
angles.copy: Your weekend plans sorted: The Open Championship is in full swing in Northern Ireland. Grab a cuppa and settle in!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, turns 79 on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Rock royalty! Brian May of Queen turns 79 this Sunday. What's your favourite riff from the Red Special maestro?

angles.name: Queen's Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incomparable Brian May's 79th birthday on Sunday! From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', his legacy is epic.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drumming legend, Don Henley, celebrates his 79th birthday on Tuesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer
angles.copy: On Tuesday, we're wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Don Henley! Co-founder of The Eagles and voice of so many classics.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'The Boys of Summer' – Don Henley turns 79 on Tuesday! What's your favourite Eagles or solo track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday George Clinton
moments.blurb: The 'Godfather of Funk', George Clinton of Parliament-Funkadelic, turns 85 on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Get ready to funk! The legendary George Clinton celebrates his 85th birthday on Wednesday. What's your favourite P-Funk jam?

angles.name: Music Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing a huge 85th birthday to the visionary George Clinton this Wednesday! His influence on music is immeasurable.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic top-hatted guitarist, Slash, turns 61 on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Sweet Child o' Mine! The one and only Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday. What's his most epic guitar solo?

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a massive happy 61st birthday to the legendary Slash this Thursday! The man, the hat, the riffs!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Day
angles.copy: It's J.Lo's birthday on Friday! The one and only Jennifer Lopez turns 57. What's your favourite hit from the triple threat?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday this Friday! From 'Jenny from the Block' to 'On The Floor', she's still got it!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 24-27, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is back at Henham Park from Thursday! Who are you most excited to see in Suffolk this weekend?

angles.name: Big Weekend Ahead
angles.copy: Get ready for some serious festival vibes! Latitude kicks off Thursday with David Byrne, Teddy Swims & Lewis Capaldi headlining.

moments.title: The Hundred Cricket Starts
moments.blurb: The Hundred, the 100-ball cricket competition, begins its 2026 season on Tuesday, July 21st, with MI London taking on Sunrisers Leeds at The Oval.

angles.name: Cricket Season
angles.copy: The Hundred is back! The 100-ball cricket competition starts Tuesday. Ready for some fast-paced action?

angles.name: Summer Sport
angles.copy: Get ready to catch some boundaries! The Hundred season begins Tuesday with teams across the UK battling it out.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, turns 83 on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday! What's your favourite Rolling Stones track to celebrate the ultimate frontman?

angles.name: Rolling Stones Legend
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger this Sunday. What a rock 'n' roll life!

moments.title: Love Island UK Finale
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated finale of Love Island UK 2026 is expected to air on Monday, July 27th, crowning this year's winning couple.

angles.name: Reality TV Climax
angles.copy: It's almost time! The Love Island UK 2026 finale is expected Monday. Who do you think will be crowned this year's winners?

angles.name: Summer of Love Ends
angles.copy: Our favourite summer show is wrapping up! Love Island UK is set for its finale Monday. Who's your money on?

moments.title: Kendal Calling Festival
moments.blurb: Kendal Calling takes over the Lake District from July 25-28, bringing music and arts to Cumbria.

angles.name: Cumbria Festival
angles.copy: Heading to the fields this weekend? Kendal Calling kicks off in the Lake District on Friday! Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Fun
angles.copy: The Lake District is calling! Kendal Calling starts Friday with a huge line-up. Festival season is in full swing!

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Many schools across the UK are finishing for the summer holidays this week and next, marking the start of the main summer break.

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: School's out for summer! Many across the UK are officially on their summer break. What are your plans for the long holidays?

angles.name: Local Summer Fun
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here for many! What local hidden gems are you planning to explore with the family over the next few weeks?

moments.title: Formula 1 Hungarian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: Formula 1 heads to the Hungaroring for the Hungarian Grand Prix, running from July 24-26, the last race before the summer break.

angles.name: F1 Weekend
angles.copy: Get ready for high-speed drama! The Formula 1 Hungarian Grand Prix takes place this weekend, July 24-26. Who's taking pole?

angles.name: Race Action
angles.copy: The last race before the summer break! F1 is in Hungary this weekend. Don't miss the action from the Hungaroring!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated every Friday, bringing the latest on the nation's favourite tracks and who's at number one.

angles.name: Chart Reveal
angles.copy: It's Friday! That means a brand new Official UK Singles Chart. Who's made it to number one this week? Tune in to find out!

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: New music Friday means new chart positions! The Official UK Singles Chart has just dropped. Any surprises at the top?
